title: Timezone set to Default causing date issues
symptom: The workflow fails to process date-time correctly due to the timezone being set to Default, leading to incorrect date parsing.
applies_when: Working with date-time values in workflows
not_this_if: Timezone is correctly set to the user's local timezone
root_cause: When the timezone is set to Default, date-time values may not be interpreted correctly, leading to parsing errors in nodes that depend on accurate date-time formats.
fix_steps: Go to the global settings in n8n
Change the timezone setting to your local timezone
Save the changes and re-run the workflow
agent_instruction: Change the global timezone setting to your local timezone in n8n.
